results.title: H. Moser’s New “Cosmic Rain” Is a Minute Repeater You Can Watch Chime
results.description: H. Moser & Cie. unveils the Endeavour Minute Repeater Cylindrical Tourbillon Cosmic Rain, a 20-piece skeleton with a dial-side repeater. The post H. Moser’s New “Cosmic Rain” Is a Minute Repeater You Can Watch Chime appeared first on Haute Time .
